childhood.familyBackground: Born into a business family with trading background. Father established family business in trading.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 거래 배경을 가진 사업 가족에서 태어남. 아버지는 거래에서 가족 사업 설립.
childhood.education: IIM Ahmedabad (Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad), St. Stephen's College
childhood.earlyLife: Joined family trading business in late 1970s at father's side. Began apprenticeship in business at age 18-19. Displayed early aptitude for industrial chemistry and manufacturing.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1970년대 후반 아버지 옆에서 가족 거래 사업 참여. 18-19세에 사업 견습 시작. 산업 화학 및 제조에 초기 적성 표시.

careerTimeline.event: Joined father's business operations; began training in industrial and trading operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 사업에 참여; 산업 및 거래 운영 교육 시작

careerTimeline.event: Instrumental in establishing Gujarat Fluorochemicals, pioneering fluoropolymer production
careerTimeline.eventKo: 구자라트 플루오로화학 설립에 핵심 역할, 플루오로폴리머 생산 개척

careerTimeline.event: Transformed family trading business into advanced materials and chemicals conglomerate
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 거래 사업을 첨단 재료 및 화학 대기업으로 전환

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into renewable energy with wind turbine manufacturing and solar energy ventures
careerTimeline.eventKo: 풍력 터빈 제조 및 태양 에너지 사업으로 재생 에너지 확장

careerTimeline.event: Pivoted INOXGFL Group toward electric vehicle battery chemicals supply chain
careerTimeline.eventKo: INOXGFL 그룹을 전기 자동차 배터리 화학 공급망으로 전환

quotes.text: Innovation is the key to success.
quotes.context: On business philosophy and growth strategy
quotes.contextKo: 사업 철학 및 성장 전략에 대해

personalTraits.knownFor: Industrial chemicals pioneer, specializes in fluoropolymers and specialty chemicals, renewable energy entrepreneur, driven by innovation
personalTraits.knownForKo: 산업 화학 선구자, 플루오로폴리머 및 특수 화학 전문, 재생 에너지 기업가, 혁신 주도
